description: A materials scientist has two optical micrographs of the same polished alloy sample region. The second image (~/Fiji_Data/raw/registration/shifted_micrograph.tif) is misaligned relative to the reference (~/Fiji_Data/raw/registration/reference_micrograph.tif) due to translation and rotation. Register the shifted image to the reference and save the aligned result to ~/Fiji_Data/results/registration/registered_micrograph.tif. Create a difference image (Reference minus Registered) and save it to ~/Fiji_Data/results/registration/difference_image.tif. Record the estimated transformation parameters (Translation X, Translation Y, Rotation) and the registration method used in a text report at ~/Fiji_Data/results/registration/alignment_report.txt.
